slides.title: A Safe Space to Share
slides.text: Difficult moments are a part of life. Tzipur gives you a safe space to share and process them together, without judgment.

slides.title: Tzipur turns it into a story
slides.text: With the help of AI, your sharing turns into a metaphorical story, tailored exactly to your child's age and emotional world.

slides.title: Read together and connect
slides.text: You and your child read the story together - a moment of mutual understanding that strengthens the bond between you.

landing.title: Turning moments of difficulty
landing.subtitle:
Turning hard moments into a story that brings you closer.
Ready to discover your story?

auth.title: Welcome
explainerBullets: Create personalized stories for you and each of your children
Save stories in a family library
auth.nicknameLabel: Choose a family name or nickname (used for connecting to Tzipur)

profile.title: Family Profile

animal.label: Favorite animal (may appear in the story)

profile.deleteConfirmMessage: This action will permanently delete the profile and cannot be undone.

creation.title: What happened today?
creation.subtitle: Choose a topic or share in your own words.
creation.freeText: You can share what happened here (e.g., 'I felt disconnected in the evening, and couldn't play together even though I wanted to...')

loader.notification: Your story is ready! Tap to review
loader.notificationBody: Your story is ready! Return to the app to read it
sentences: We sent a dove with your message... it's already returning

preview.title: Review Before Reading
preview.instruction: Your story is ready to read!
preview.editLabel: You can request adjustments before reading together:
preview.editPlaceholder: For example: soften the tone, or use our nicknames for the characters
preview.editBoxNotEmpty: Send edit requests or clear the text box before continuing
preview.warningMessage: You have edit requests that haven't been sent. If you continue to reading, they won't be included.

end.title: The End...
end.subtitle: We hope this was a connecting read. We invite you to read the 'Tip for Parents' to continue the conversation.

guestWarning.title: Don't lose your stories!
guestWarning.message: You're currently browsing as a guest. To save this story and return to it later, we recommend creating an account.

createBanner.title: Create a new story
createBanner.subtitle: To help with a challenging moment

error.title: Oops, something went wrong...
error.message: An unexpected error occurred. We're working on it.

common.disclaimer: Stories are generated using AI and are not a substitute for professional advice or therapy. Please review them carefully before reading together.
